mapper.insert: INSERT INTO challenge_chat_message ( challenge_id, user_id, nickname, content, created_at ) VALUES ( #{challengeId}, #{userId}, #{nickname}, #{content}, NOW() )
mapper.select: SELECT challenge_id AS challengeId, user_id AS userId, nickname, content, created_at AS createdAt FROM challenge_chat_message WHERE challenge_id = #{challengeId} ORDER BY created_at ASC
